description: Create a GitHub Actions CI workflow that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests. First, run a pre-commit check on an ubuntu-latest environment. If it passes, then run tests on multiple OS environments (ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest) with various Python versions (3.6 to 3.10) in parallel, install dependencies with poetry, test with pytest, generate a coverage report, and upload it to Codecov using the CODECOV_TOKEN from secrets.
